rules.title: Exemption for Securities under clause (b), (d) and (e) of sub-regulation (1) of regulation 9 of SAST Regulations, 2011
rules.check:
fun i => True, -- No applicable fields in Issuer structure
    failReason := fun _ => "This rule does not apply to the provided Issuer structure.",
    remedy? := none
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "This rule does not apply to the provided Issuer structure.",
    remedy? := none

rules.title: Disqualification: issuer/promoters/directors/selling shareholders debarred
rules.failReason:
fun i => if (i.is_debarred) then "Issuer is debarred." else if (i.has_debarred_directors) then "One or more directors are debarred." else if (i.selling_shareholders_debarred) then "Selling shareholders are debarred." else "No disqualifying debarment found.",
    remedy? := some "Lift the debarment to become eligible."

rules.title: Disqualification: promoter/director of another debarred company
rules.failReason:
fun i => if (i.directors.exists (fun d => d.other_debarred_companies.length > 0)) then "One or more directors are associated with a debarred company." else "No disqualifying director-company relationship found.",
    remedy? := some "Remove the association with the debarred company to become eligible."

rules.title: Disqualification: wilful defaulter or fraudulent borrower
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Issuer is fraudulent.",
    remedy? := some "Rectify the fraudulent activities to become eligible."

rules.title: No outstanding convertibles/rights (pre-IPO)
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Issuer has outstanding convertibles.",
    remedy? := some "Resolve the outstanding convertibles to become eligible."

rules.title: Net tangible assets ≥ ₹3 cr (pre-IPO)
rules.failReason:
fun i =>
      let ntaMsg :=
        if !(lengthIs i.net_tangible_assets 3) then "Need 3 full-year NTA figures."
        else if !(allGeNat i.net_tangible_assets 30000000) then "Each year’s net tangible assets must be ≥ ₹3.0 crore."
        else ""
      String.intercalate " " ([ntaMsg].filter (· ≠ "")),
    remedy? := some "Demonstrate ≥ ₹3 cr in each of the last 3 full years."

rules.title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr (pre-IPO)
Net worth ≥ ₹1 cr (pre-IPO)
Application for in-principle approval to one or more stock exchanges
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "No application for in-principle approval submitted.",
    remedy? := some "Apply to one or more stock exchanges for in-principle approval."

rules.title: Agreement with depository for dematerialisation of securities
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "No agreement with a depository for dematerialisation.",
    remedy? := some "Sign an agreement with a depository for dematerialisation."

rules.title: All specified securities held by promoters in dematerialized form
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Promoters' specified securities not in dematerialised form.",
    remedy? := some "Convert promoters' specified securities to dematerialised form."

rules.title: All existing partly paid-up equity shares fully paid or forfeited
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "Existing partly paid-up equity shares not fully paid or forfeited.",

rules.title: Firm arrangements of finance towards 75% of issue proceeds
rules.failReason:
fun _ => "No firm arrangements of finance towards 75% of issue proceeds.",

issuer_questions.question: Is the issuer debarred?
Do any directors have a debarment record?
Are selling shareholders debarred?
Which companies are the directors associated with (if any)?
Does the issuer have outstanding convertibles or rights to receive equity before filing?
What is the net tangible assets for each of the last 3 full years (₹ paise)?
What percentage of net tangible assets are held in monetary assets?
Have excess monetary assets been used or firmly committed?
Is the IPO entirely an offer for sale (no fresh issue)?
What is the operating profit for each of the last 3 full years (₹ paise)?
What is the net worth for each of the last 3 full years (₹ paise)?
Has the company changed its name within the last 1 year?
What percentage of revenue came from the new-name activity in the preceding full year?
Has an application been made to one or more stock exchanges for in-principle approval?
Is there an agreement with a depository for dematerialisation of securities?
Are all specified securities held by promoters in dematerialised form?
Have all existing partly paid-up equity shares been fully paid or forfeited?
Have firm arrangements of finance towards 75% of issue proceeds been made?
What is the tenure of warrants (months)?
Is the exercise price determined upfront and at least 25% of the consideration amount based on the exercise price received upfront?
What percentage of post-issue capital is held by promoters?
What is the lock-in period for minimum promoters’ contribution (months)?
What is the lock-in period for promoters’ excess contribution (months)?
What is the lock-in period for specified securities held by persons other than promoters (months)?
Who holds the specified securities (persons other than promoters)?
